title: Cup Of Mixture
content:
For every Guest who comes with him to sup,
    The Host compounds a strangely mingled cup;--
    Red Wine of Life and Dregs of Bitterness,
    And, will-he, nil-he, each must drink it up.
meaning:
William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Cup Of Mixture"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
